rulings.Case Title: AMISH PATEL VS. RICHARD SMITH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 13, 2014, line 6. PLAINTIFF AMISH PATEL's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall personally serve responses without objections to Form Interrogatories - UD (Set One); Special Interrogatories (Set One and Request for Production of Documents (Set One) within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $885. = (501/REQ)
